summary: Completed comprehensive testing of virtual/B2B products checkout fix and catalog_design edit feature. All 11 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed: catalog_design items show edit button (pencil icon) in cart, clicking edit navigates to /katalog-designer?edit={cartItemId}, CatalogDesigner hydrates all data (company_name, template, theme, pages) from cart item in edit mode, button shows 'Spara ändringar' in edit mode. Admin OrderDetailPanel code review confirms correct implementation of CatalogDesignCustomization, BusinesscardCustomization, PrintCatalogCustomization, and OurCatalogCustomization components.
critical_code_review_comments: payments.py _build_order_items(): Correctly handles virtual products (print-*, our-catalog-*) by using cart_item price/name when product not found in DB
payments.py _build_order_items(): Zero-price items without DB product are correctly skipped (line 26-27)
CartItemCard.js isEditable(): catalog_design removed from nonEditable list - edit button now shows
CartItemCard.js getEditorUrl(): Returns /katalog-designer?edit={cartItemId} for catalog_design type
CatalogDesigner.js useEffect (line 200-218): Correctly hydrates state from cart item when editCartItemId is present
CatalogDesigner.js: Button text changes to 'Spara ändringar' when editCartItemId is set (line 352)
OrderDetailPanel.js: CatalogDesignCustomization renders company_name, template, page_count, theme color/font, logo, pages
OrderDetailPanel.js: BusinesscardCustomization renders source, card_details, filename, PDF download
OrderDetailPanel.js: PrintCatalogCustomization renders type, filename, PDF download
OrderDetailPanel.js: OurCatalogCustomization renders catalog_type, company_name, contact_email

test_credentials.note: Admin requires 2FA - could not test admin panel UI directly

seed_data_creation: Created test catalog design items during testing via cart API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Virtual products checkout fix verified. Virtual product IDs: print-catalog-custom, print-businesscard, print-catalog, our-catalog-physical, our-catalog-digital. These don't exist in products DB - _build_order_items now uses cart_item price/name when product not found. Cart edit for catalog_design works: edit button visible, navigates to /katalog-designer?edit={id}, hydrates data, shows 'Spara ändringar'. Admin 2FA blocks admin panel testing - OrderDetailPanel code reviewed and confirmed correct.

Backend: Virtual Products in Checkout.print-catalog-custom included: ✓ PASSED - checkout proceeds without 'Ogiltig totalsumma' error
Backend: Virtual Products in Checkout.our-catalog-physical (free): ✓ PASSED - added to cart, skipped in checkout (price=0)
Backend: Virtual Products in Checkout.our-catalog-digital (free): ✓ PASSED - added to cart, skipped in checkout (price=0)

Admin OrderDetailPanel (Code Review).CatalogDesignCustomization component: ✓ Renders company_name, template, page_count, theme, logo, pages
Admin OrderDetailPanel (Code Review).BusinesscardCustomization component: ✓ Renders source, card_details, filename, PDF download

Bug 1: catalog_design blocked from editi.verification: Edit button now appears on catalog_design items in cart

Bug 2: Virtual products dropped in check.root_cause: _build_order_items() only included products found in DB, silently dropping virtual B2B products
Bug 2: Virtual products dropped in check.fix: Now uses cart_item price/name when product not found in DB (line 24-25)
Bug 2: Virtual products dropped in check.verification: Checkout proceeds without 'Ogiltig totalsumma' error for virtual products
